raw_consumer_statement: I am appealing the automated closure of Barclays dispute case XXXX regarding a charge from XXXX. Barclays closed this case using 'proof of delivery ' as their sole justification. While a package was delivered, the merchant sent a counterfeit or fraudulently substituted item. The sewn-in XXXX XXXX security QR code on the garment scans as a completely different product color/description in the manufacturer 's database, proving the item is an inauthentic replica. Barclays is violating my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act by refusing to evaluate my physical manufacturer proof. I request that case XXXX be reopened and the charge reversed. ''
